arts.ttl: How many points do Real Madrid need in the Champions League to qualify for the round of 16?
arts.sum: After the first five games, Carlo Ancelotti’s team sits in 24th place with six points (two wins and three losses), the last spot that grants access to the knockout phase playoffs, which determine the final eight qualifiers for the Round of 16. At the start of the season, UEFA conducted multiple simulations to predict the number of points needed to advance in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Gasperini: ‘Nobody can call themselves favourites against Real Madrid’

arts.ttl: When is Atalanta - Real Madrid? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The Champions League matchday-six game between Atalanta and Real Madrid will be played on Tuesday December 10 at Gewiss Stadium, with kick-off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 noon PT . Los Blancos' Champions League campaign hasn’t gone to plan, with losses against Lille, AC Milan and Liverpool sounding the alarm bells.

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Real Madrid in January
arts.sum: Out of contract at Bayer Leverkusen, Tah is free to negotiate with interested clubs in January and Real Madrid view him as a priority option for the centre of defence. Finding a potential centre-back reinforcement for the club was tricky because Real Madrid are intent on bringing in several free agents next year.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch responds to glowing comparisons with Real Madrid icon
arts.sum: Liverpool's failure to sign a new No.6 in the summer has been barely noticeable thanks to Ryan Gravenberch stepping into the role and flourishing under Arne Slot this season

arts.ttl: Team News: Atalanta BC vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Atalanta BC and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Fede Valverde: “It’s messed up seeing Real Madrid 24th, we’re not used to it”
arts.sum: Real Madrid put forward midfielder Fede Valverde to speak ahead of Tuesday night’s Champions League tie with Atalanta in Italy, as the midfielder described the club’s current position in the Champions League table by saying “it’s messed up, obviously. I want to be of service to the team, to give my best wherever I’m put and wherever I’m needed.
